typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Variable as integer (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Data_Src as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_MaxSK as integer (),
	var_Dim_Query as string (),
	var_Duplicate_Rec as string (),
	var_Dw_Effective_End_Date as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	var_Dw_Run_Month as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_Initial_Catalog1 as string (),
	var_Password as string (),
	var_ProjectID as integer (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string (),
	var_User_Name as string ()
}

source(output(
		TestCasesID as integer,
		Title as string,
		PreRequisite as string,
		Description as string,
		ReviewedBy as string,
		ApprovedBy as string,
		ActualResult as string,
		ExpectedResult as string,
		RequirementNo as string,
		Status as string,
		TestData as string,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		ProjectID as integer,
		Modified as timestamp,
		Created as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::var_Dim_Query',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCTestCases	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		ComanyResourceName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(CompanyResourceName))) ComanyResourceName from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPComapnyResourcesAbyLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CompanyResourceSk as integer,
		ComanyResourceName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select CompanyResourceSk,lower(ltrim(rtrim(CompanyResourceName))) ComanyResourceName from  dw.D_CompanyResources where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPComapnyResourcesRbyLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select ProjectSK, ProjectID from dw.D_Projects where dw_current_flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectsLKPTABLE	source(output(
		TestCaseSK as integer,
		TestCasesID as integer,
		TestCaseTitle as string,
		TestCasePreRequisite as string,
		TestCaseDescription as string,
		TestCaseReviewedBySk as integer,
		TestCaseAprovedBySK as integer,
		ActualResult as string,
		ExpectedResult as string,
		RequirementNo as string,
		TestCaseStatus as string,
		Testdata as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Create_DateTime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_DateTime as timestamp,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		TestCaseProjectSk as integer,
		DProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select *,  (select ProjectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=TestCaseProjectSk group by ProjectID) as DProjectID from dw.D_TestCases  where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPTestCasesLKPTABLE
OLESRCTestCases derive(Modifed_Begin_Date = Modified,
		Modifed_End_Date = Modified) ~> DERModifiedDate
LKPTestCasesLKPTABLE select(mapColumn(
		TestCaseSK = TestCaseSK,
		TestCasesID_newRenamed = TestCasesID,
		TestCaseTitle = TestCaseTitle,
		TestCasePreRequisite = TestCasePreRequisite,
		TestCaseDescription = TestCaseDescription,
		TestCaseReviewedBySk = TestCaseReviewedBySk,
		TestCaseAprovedBySK = TestCaseAprovedBySK,
		ActualResult_newRenamed = ActualResult,
		ExpectedResult_newRenamed = ExpectedResult,
		RequirementNo_newRenamed = RequirementNo,
		TestCaseStatus = TestCaseStatus,
		Testdata = Testdata,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DW_Effective_End_Date,
		DW_Create_DateTime = DW_Create_DateTime,
		DW_Update_DateTime = DW_Update_DateTime,
		DW_Run_Key_newRenamed = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Update_Run_Key = DW_Update_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag_newRenamed = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		DW_Current_Flag = DW_Current_Flag,
		TestCaseProjectSk = TestCaseProjectSk,
		DProjectID = DProjectID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPTestCasesLKPTABLEREFORMAT
DERModifiedDate,LKPProjectsLKPTABLE lookup(OLESRCTestCases@ProjectID == LKPProjectsLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProjects
LKPProjects select(mapColumn(
		Modifed_Begin_Date = Modifed_Begin_Date,
		Modifed_End_Date = Modifed_End_Date,
		TestCasesID = TestCasesID,
		Title = Title,
		PreRequisite = PreRequisite,
		Description = Description,
		ReviewedBy = ReviewedBy,
		ApprovedBy = ApprovedBy,
		ActualResult = ActualResult,
		ExpectedResult = ExpectedResult,
		RequirementNo = RequirementNo,
		Status = Status,
		TestData = TestData,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectID = OLESRCTestCases@ProjectID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Created = Created,
		{} = {},
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectsSelect
LKPProjectsSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPProjectsIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPProjectsIsMatch@Match,LKPComapnyResourcesAbyLKPTABLE lookup(ApprovedBy == ComanyResourceName,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPComapnyResourcesAby
LKPComapnyResourcesAby split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPComapnyResourcesAbyIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPComapnyResourcesAbyIsMatch@Match,LKPComapnyResourcesRbyLKPTABLE lookup(ReviewedBy == ComanyResourceName,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPComapnyResourcesRby
LKPComapnyResourcesRby select(mapColumn(
		CompanyResourceSk = LKPComapnyResourcesRbyLKPTABLE@CompanyResourceSk,
		ComanyResourceName = ComanyResourceName,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		Modifed_Begin_Date = Modifed_Begin_Date,
		Modifed_End_Date = Modifed_End_Date,
		TestCasesID = TestCasesID,
		Title = Title,
		PreRequisite = PreRequisite,
		Description = Description,
		ReviewedBy = ReviewedBy,
		ApprovedBy = ApprovedBy,
		ActualResult = ActualResult,
		ExpectedResult = ExpectedResult,
		RequirementNo = RequirementNo,
		Status = Status,
		TestData = TestData,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Created = Created,
		{} = {}
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPComapnyResourcesRbySelect
LKPComapnyResourcesRbySelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPComapnyResourcesRbyIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPComapnyResourcesRbyIsMatch@Match derive(var_End_Date = toTimestamp(toString(('9999-12-31 00:00:00.000'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Begin_Date = toTimestamp(toString(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt, toString(Modified)), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Curr_Flag = 1,
		var_Update_Run_Key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key,
		var_Run_Key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key,
		var_ProjectSK = iif(isNull(ProjectSK), -(3), ProjectSK),
		var_CompanyResourceA_by_SK = iif(isNull(CompanyResourceSk), -(3), CompanyResourceSk),
		var_CompanyResourceR_by_SK = iif(isNull(CompanyResourceSk), -(3), CompanyResourceSk),
		var_Title = iif(isNull(Title), '', Title),
		var_ActualResult = iif(isNull(ActualResult), '', ActualResult),
		var_RequirementNo = iif(isNull(RequirementNo), '', RequirementNo),
		var_Status = iif(isNull(Status), '', Status),
		var_TestData = iif(isNull(TestData), '', TestData),
		var_Description = iif(isNull(Description), '', Description),
		var_PreRequisite = iif(isNull(PreRequisite), '', PreRequisite),
		var_ExpectedResult = iif(isNull(ExpectedResult), '', ExpectedResult)) ~> DERDerivedFields2
DERDerivedFields2 derive(drv_var_Status = toString(var_Status),
		drv_var_Title = toString(var_Title),
		drv_var_Description = toString(var_Description),
		drv_var_ActualResult = toString(var_ActualResult),
		drv_var_RequirementNo = toString(var_RequirementNo),
		drv_var_PreRequisite = toString(var_PreRequisite),
		drv_var_ExpectedResult = toString(var_ExpectedResult),
		drv_var_TestData = toString(var_TestData)) ~> DCStringType
DCStringType,LKPTestCasesLKPTABLEREFORMAT lookup(ProjectID == DProjectID && TestCasesID == TestCasesID_newRenamed,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPTestCases
LKPTestCases split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPTestCasesIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPTestCasesIsMatch@Match split(((trim(drv_var_Title) != trim(TestCaseTitle)) || (var_CompanyResourceA_by_SK != TestCaseAprovedBySK) || (var_ProjectSK != TestCaseProjectSk) || (trim(drv_var_ActualResult) != trim(ActualResult_newRenamed)) || (trim(drv_var_PreRequisite) != trim(TestCasePreRequisite)) || (var_CompanyResourceR_by_SK != TestCaseReviewedBySk) || (trim(var_Status) != trim(TestCaseStatus)) || (trim(var_RequirementNo) != trim(RequirementNo_newRenamed)) || (trim(var_ExpectedResult) != trim(ExpectedResult_newRenamed)) || (trim(drv_var_Description) != trim(TestCaseDescription)) || (trim(var_TestData) != trim(Testdata))), disjoint: true) ~> CSPLPullChangedRecords@(csplUpdtaeInsertChng,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
CSPLPullChangedRecords@CSPLPullChangedRecordsTOCMDExpiretheoldrecordLINK sink(input(
		{} as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CMDExpiretheoldrecord
CSPLPullChangedRecords@OLEDBCommandOutput,LKPTestCasesIsMatch@NotMatch union(byName: true) ~> AllNewChangedRecord
AllNewChangedRecord sink(input(
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		RequirementNo as string,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		TestCaseProjectSk as integer,
		TestCasePreRequisite as string,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		TestCaseStatus as string,
		ExpectedResult as string,
		TestCaseReviewedBySk as integer,
		ActualResult as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		TestCaseAprovedBySK as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_Key as integer,
		TestCasesID as integer,
		Testdata as string,
		TestCaseTitle as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TestCaseDescription as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		DW_Effective_End_Date = var_End_Date,
		RequirementNo = drv_var_RequirementNo,
		DW_Upsert_Flag,
		TestCaseProjectSk = var_ProjectSK,
		TestCasePreRequisite = drv_var_PreRequisite,
		DW_Run_Key = var_Run_Key,
		TestCaseStatus = drv_var_Status,
		ExpectedResult = drv_var_ExpectedResult,
		TestCaseReviewedBySk = var_CompanyResourceR_by_SK,
		ActualResult = drv_var_ActualResult,
		DW_Current_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		TestCaseAprovedBySK = var_CompanyResourceA_by_SK,
		DW_Update_Run_Key = var_Update_Run_Key,
		TestCasesID,
		Testdata = drv_var_TestData,
		TestCaseTitle = drv_var_Title,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = var_Begin_Date,
		TestCaseDescription = drv_var_Description)) ~> InsertInDTestCases
